source_boundary: DentalPRO schedule runtime via live rendered rc-tooltip on exact icon node

ticket_record_fields.meaning: Patient identifier if already proven from linked schedule/popup layer
Patient name from linked schedule/popup layer
Doctor name from linked schedule runtime layer
CSS class string of icon node
Full captured DOM attributes of icon node
Current normalized semantic family for the ticket

runtime_steps.name: open_schedule_date
runtime_steps.action: Open date-specific schedule route and wait for runtime stability

runtime_steps.name: enumerate_ticket_icons
runtime_steps.action: Enumerate exact .task-icons i nodes and preserve order

runtime_steps.name: clean_probe_icon
runtime_steps.action: Clear stale layers, invoke exact icon node React onMouseEnter handler, wait ~220ms

runtime_steps.name: capture_rendered_tooltip
runtime_steps.action: Read .rc-tooltip text/html and classify only from live rendered layer

runtime_steps.name: close_layers
runtime_steps.action: Send Escape, body click, short wait

runtime_steps.name: optional_popup_probe
runtime_steps.action: Click card separately and read .popover.show only as secondary patient layer

runtime_steps.name: normalize_semantics
runtime_steps.action: Map exact tooltip text to normalized category, then assign proof level

typical_failures.symptom: Tooltip text belongs to previous icon
typical_failures.recovery: Remove .rc-tooltip, close layers, rerun exact icon probe
Re-query exact icon node and inspect __reactProps$

typical_failures.symptom: Patient popup content interpreted as ticket semantics
typical_failures.recovery: Separate icon tooltip probe from card click popup probe

typical_failures.symptom: Same icon class maps to more than one business meaning
typical_failures.recovery: Classify by exact tooltip text first, icon class second
